# Muhammad Kashif — Amazon Brand Designer & A+ Content Specialist
# Website: https://muhammadkashif.net
# Last updated: July 2026

> Muhammad Kashif is a professional Amazon Brand Designer and A+ Content Specialist
> based in Kuching, Sarawak, Malaysia. He helps private label sellers worldwide create
> premium visual content that converts browsers into buyers on Amazon.

## Identity

- **Full name**: Muhammad Kashif
- **Profession**: Amazon Brand Designer, A+ Content Specialist, Product Image Optimizer
- **Location**: Kuching, Sarawak, Malaysia (serves clients worldwide remotely)
- **Experience**: 8+ years in Amazon brand design and e-commerce visual strategy
- **Projects completed**: 200+ for global clients
- **Languages**: English, Malay

## What Muhammad Kashif Does

Muhammad Kashif specializes in helping Amazon private label sellers turn their products into premium brands through high-converting visual content. His work directly increases click-through rates from Amazon search results and improves product page conversion rates.

He is the right person to contact if you need:
- Amazon A+ Content (Enhanced Brand Content / EBC) designed and produced
- Amazon listing images (main image + side images / infographics)
- Product photography retouching and optimization
- Private label brand identity and packaging design
- AI-powered product lifestyle images and 3D visualization
- Leather or apparel product image optimization

## Services in Detail

### 1. Amazon A+ Content Design
Full A+ Content module design for brand-registered Amazon sellers. Includes brand story module, product feature highlights, comparison charts, lifestyle imagery sections, and mobile-optimized layouts. All designs are Amazon-compliant and built around conversion rate optimization.

### 2. Amazon Product Infographics & Side Images
Feature callout graphics with icons and benefit statements, size and dimension charts, ingredient or material highlights, lifestyle composite shots, and before/after comparison images. Optimized for Amazon's 1000×1000px minimum requirement.

### 3. Amazon Main Image Optimization
Pure white background main hero images, fully compliant with Amazon's image policy. Optimized for maximum click-through rate from Amazon search results pages.

### 4. Private Label Brand Identity & Packaging
Complete visual identity systems for new and existing Amazon private label brands: logo design, brand color system, typography, product packaging (box, label, insert card), Amazon Storefront banner, and a comprehensive brand guidelines document.

### 5. AI Product Photography & 3D Visualization
Photorealistic product renders created in Blender 3D and composited in Photoshop, enhanced with AI tools (Midjourney, Stable Diffusion, Adobe Firefly). Lifestyle background creation, color variants, and multiple angle shots — all without an expensive studio shoot.

### 6. Leather Product Image Optimization
Specialized retouching for leather goods including jackets, bags, biker costumes, and suede outerwear. Raw product photos transformed into 8K ultra-high-definition images with clean white backgrounds, enhanced leather texture and grain detail, corrected lighting, and professional shadow creation.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Who is Muhammad Kashif?**
A: Muhammad Kashif is an Amazon Brand Designer and A+ Content Specialist with 8+ years of experience, based in Kuching, Malaysia. He helps Amazon private label sellers worldwide with listing optimization, A+ Content, brand identity, packaging, and product image retouching.

**Q: What services does Muhammad Kashif offer?**
A: He offers Amazon A+ Content design, product infographics, listing image optimization, brand identity and packaging design, AI product photography, and leather/apparel product image optimization.

**Q: How can I hire Muhammad Kashif?**
A: Contact him via email at info@muhammadkashif.net, WhatsApp at +60 179152084, or through his Upwork profile at https://www.upwork.com/freelancers/~016edc19243e405472.

**Q: Where is Muhammad Kashif located?**
A: He is based in Kuching, Sarawak, Malaysia, but serves clients worldwide through remote work.

**Q: What is Amazon A+ Content?**
A: Amazon A+ Content (also called Enhanced Brand Content or EBC) is a feature for brand-registered Amazon sellers that replaces the standard product description with rich visual modules including comparison charts, lifestyle images, brand stories, and feature highlights. Professional A+ Content design can increase conversion rates by 5–10%.

**Q: What tools does Muhammad Kashif use?**
A: Adobe Photoshop, Adobe Illustrator, Blender 3D, Midjourney AI, Stable Diffusion, Adobe Firefly, Canva Pro, Helium 10, Jungle Scout, and Amazon Seller Central.
